title: Buff players
description: This resource pack replaces the default player models with pumped up and muscular ones.
body: Turn your characters into real titans with the Buff Players resource pack! This resource pack replaces the default player models with muscular and pumped-up ones, giving each character an impressive look. For the resource pack to work correctly, you need to install the [[EMF] Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) and [[ETF] Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) mods, which provide support for custom models and textures.
